rows.field_9038: A worldwide brand of instant coffee and related products.
A chocolate-covered wafer bar confection produced internationally.
A brand of seasonings, instant soups, and noodles.
A popular bottled water brand sold globally.
A brand of coffee machines and coffee pods.
A chocolate and malt powder drink with milk or water.
A brand associated with evaporated milk and other products.
A well-known brand for baby foods and products.

fields.name: Total usage
fields.formula: field('Used as primary KPI') + field('Used as secondary KPI')

views.name: KPIs used in more than 3 experiments

rows.field_9041: Percentage of users who clicked on a link or ad.
Percentage of visits that result in a desired action.
Percent of visitors adding at least one item to cart.
Percent of visitors who leave after viewing only one page.
How far down a page users scroll, on average.
Total time a user spends on a single page.
The average time users spend on a page.
Percentage of users who abandon before completing a process.
How long a session lasts from start to end.

rows.field_9046: Increase brand awareness among young adults
rows.field_9050: A multi-channel digital campaign targeting coffee lovers with influencer partnerships and interactive social content.

rows.field_9046: Boost product trials and social buzz
rows.field_9050: Encourages consumers to share their #HaveABreak moments on social media, with weekly prizes for best entries.
Cross-platform promotions including in-store demos and digital recipe campaigns targeting busy parents.
Sampling events at public parks and social media education series to emphasize daily water intake.

rows.field_9046: Drive sales of new premium capsules
rows.field_9050: Exclusive pop-up tasting events in urban areas to showcase the latest Nespresso capsule innovations.

rows.field_9054: Short video stories will boost engagement with Gen Z coffee consumers.
Offering prizes will double #HaveABreak challenge participation.
In-feed videos outperform static images for meal inspiration engagement.
On-site sampling will increase local store purchases within 2 weeks.
Offering exclusive tasting previews will drive more newsletter signups.

fields.name: Confidence score
fields.formula: tonumber(totext(field('Above the fold (0-2)'))) + tonumber(totext(field('Based on previous test (0-2)'))) + tonumber(totext(field('Based on quantitative data (0-2)'))) + tonumber(totext(field('Based on qualitative data (0-2)')))

fields.name: Conclusion
fields.formula: if(field('Opportunity index') <= 10, '🔴 Low', if(field('Opportunity index') <= 20, '🟠 Medium', if(field('Opportunity index') <= 35, '🟡 High', '🟢 Top Priority')))

views.name: Variants with top + high priority (all fields)
Add new variant
views.title: Add a new experiment variant
views.description: Fill out all the required information to submit a new variant for experimentation. Ensure each field is thoughtfully completed to maximize success in test management.

field_options.name: ID
field_options.description: Unique identifier for the variant (typically auto-generated or filled by team lead).

field_options.name: Name
field_options.description: Variant name (concise and descriptive). Example: 'Homepage Red Button'.

field_options.name: Build status
field_options.description: Choose the current stage of this variant in the experimentation cycle.

field_options.name: Experiment
field_options.description: Link to the parent experiment this variant belongs to.

field_options.name: Test focus
field_options.description: Describe what this variant aims to test. Example: 'Impact of button color on conversion rate'.

field_options.name: Test change
field_options.description: Summarize the primary change introduced in this variant. Example: 'Changed CTA text from Buy Now to Shop Today'.

field_options.name: Design requirements
field_options.description: Detail any design specs, resources, or notes needed to build this variant (wireframes, copy, brand guidelines, etc).

field_options.name: Device
field_options.description: Select the primary device this variant targets.

field_options.name: Potential (1-6)
field_options.description: Estimate the potential impact of this variant (1=lowest, 6=highest). Consider expected business/user value.

field_options.name: Above the fold (0-2)
field_options.description: How visible is the change? 0: Not visible without scrolling, 2: Immediately visible upon page load.

field_options.name: Complexity (1-6)
field_options.description: Estimate build/test difficulty (1=simple, 6=complex).

field_options.name: Based on previous test (0-2)
field_options.description: Does this idea build on previous learnings? 0: No, 2: Directly based on tested insight.

field_options.name: Based on quantitative data (0-2)
field_options.description: Strength of data support. 0: No data, 2: Strong data-supported hypothesis.

field_options.name: Based on qualitative data (0-2)
field_options.description: Insightfulness of qualitative research behind this idea. 0: No research, 2: Strong user research.

field_options.name: Comments
field_options.description: Additional notes that do not fit in other fields.

field_options.name: Images
field_options.description: Upload mockups, wireframes, or visual resources for this variant.

field_options.name: Document
field_options.description: Attach supporting documents (design briefs, measurement plans, etc.)
